raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is the first state in the nation to provide full scope Medi-Cal coverage to income-eligible undocumented seniors aged 50 and older.",
    "The California State Budget includes a $1 billion investment in broadband for rural communities to improve last-mile infrastructure lines.",
    "The State Budget allocates $50 million to support and sustain new primary care residency programs over six years through the Song-Brown Health Care Workforce Training Program.",
    "The budget includes $12.9 million in ongoing funds to increase funding for the University of California Programs in Medical Education (UC PRIME).",
    "The State Budget will invest $4.4 billion over five years to create new and innovative Youth Behavioral Health programs for youth up to age 25.",
    "$10.9 million in state and federal funds will be added to Medi-Cal benefits for continuous glucose monitoring systems for beneficiaries with Type 1 diabetes starting January 1, 2022.",
    "The budget includes a financial investment for reforming CalAIM (California Advancing and Innovating Medi-Cal) to improve services and reduce health disparities.",
    "$10 million in one-time funds and $750,000 annually will be allocated to establish a statewide electronic registry for Physician Orders for Life Sustaining Treatment (POLST).",
    "The State Budget includes $13 million in ongoing funds to support investments aimed at 'Ending the Epidemics' of HIV/AIDS, hepatitis, sexually transmitted infections, and drug overdose deaths."
  ]
}
```
